commands.review_summary:
The PR internalizes the former Pi agent runtime into OpenClaw-owned agent-core, LLM, session, provider, plugin SDK, docs, tests, build, and dependency surfaces while removing or deprecating Pi-era compatibility paths.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection against PR head shows the env resolver, SDK type surface, official-install matching, and live-provider normalizer regressions. Full runtime behavior still needs fresh real-environment proof on the latest head.
